summary: Frontend-only retest completed on local static preview (http://127.0.0.1:3456). Mobile flow and theme toggle work, but desktop home layout still behaves like a stacked mobile layout and some visible date copy remains English.

ui_bugs.issue: At desktop viewport (1920x1080), hero content is still vertically stacked (title above image) instead of desktop landing two-column presentation.
Visible date text still renders in English (e.g., 'Wed, April 15'), conflicting with full Indonesian copy expectation.

issues: Desktop breakpoint presentation does not feel like a boutique landing page because key hero structure remains stacked like mobile.

action_items: Fix desktop breakpoint activation/layout on Home so hero and trust sections render in a true web landing-page structure.
Localize all calendar/date output to Indonesian (weekday/month labels and pretty date format).
Re-validate Home desktop at >=980 width after breakpoint fix with screenshot evidence.
critical_code_review_comments: `/app/frontend/utils/calendar.ts` hardcodes English weekday names (`Sun`..`Sat`) and uses locale-undefined date formatting, causing English date output in UI.

`HomeScreen` desktop behavior depends on `isDesktop = Platform.OS === "web" && width >= 980`; current runtime result indicates desktop branch is not taking effect in rendered output and needs verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified on local static URL per instruction (http://127.0.0.1:3456). Home->Vendor Detail->Booking->Success works on mobile viewport. Theme toggle cycles OTOMATIS->GELAP->TERANG->OTOMATIS. NOTE: Availability and booking webhook flows are MOCKED (n8n availability webhook, n8n booking submission webhook).
rca_of_issue: Desktop issue reproduction: open Home at 1920x1080 and inspect `home-hero-title` vs `home-hero-image` positions; image Y position is below title (stacked), indicating desktop hero layout branch not applied at runtime. Indonesian-copy issue reproduction: complete booking flow and observe Success date shown as English ('Wed, April 15'). Mitigation: enforce Indonesian locale formatting in calendar utilities and re-check desktop breakpoint state application.
